title: Why Mitochondria Are the Powerhouses
script_summary: Explore the incredible role of mitochondria in our cells and their ancient origins.

segments.voiceover: Your cells run on tiny ancient power plants — and they have their own DNA.
Meet mitochondria, the energy factories that convert food into fuel, powering every move you make.
But here’s the twist: They were once free-living bacteria. Yes, you heard that right!
This endosymbiotic theory explains how they became essential to our cells, merging with us over billions of years.
So next time you feel energized, remember — it’s those ancient power plants working hard for you.
Curious about more science secrets? Like and follow for more!
